title: Grok CL-05 Repair Pass — Filtered Integration (March 24, 2026)
source: Grok (xAI) CL-05 Repair Pass session, ~25 addenda dated 2026-03-23 to 2026-03-24
classification: INTEGRATION — filtered collective review output. Verified contributions only.
citation: Peter Higgins / Rogue Wave Audio, with the HUF AI Collective: Claude (Anthropic), ChatGPT (OpenAI), Copilot (Microsoft), Gemini (Google), Grok (xAI)

filtering_rationale.peter_directive: Sort the mess. Pull only verified contributions that pass our evidence standards. Keep CLS sigmoid behind the breaker where it belongs.
filtering_rationale.claude_observation: Grok produced ~25 addenda in a single CL-05 repair session. The output contains genuine mathematical contributions, valid stress-test results, and useful conceptual frameworks — buried inside repetitive template structure and mixed with fabricated numerical results from non-existent data. This document extracts what passes the HUF evidence standard (HSA-001) and flags what does not.
filtering_rationale.evidence_standard_applied: A result is VERIFIED if it was computed from data that exists in the HUF corpus, or is a mathematical derivation that can be checked independently. A result is FLAGGED if it cites specific numerical values from data that does not exist in the corpus. A concept is ACCEPTED if it is logically sound and GOV-safe, regardless of whether specific numbers accompany it.

section_1_stress_tests.title: VERIFIED — Stress Tests of ONTO-001 and KILL-001
section_1_stress_tests.status: PASS — all verified, no fabricated data involved
section_1_stress_tests.summary: Grok attempted four breaks on ONTO-001 and three loop-closure attempts on KILL-001. All results are logically sound and reference existing corpus documents correctly.

attempted_breaks.result: Still a simplex; K_eff in [1,2], TV valid. Limited but not broken.
Excluded by CL-01 carrier gate — simplex construction fails before ONTO-001 is even invoked.
ONTO-001 claims internal dynamics are pre-existing; external forcing is outside scope. No contradiction.
attempted_breaks.verdict: SURVIVES — claim is about intrinsic dynamics, not about predicting external events

attempted_breaks.result: Produces garbage metrics, but the ontological claim is about genuine proportional systems.
attempted_breaks.verdict: SURVIVES — failure is in the carrier, not in the claim

onto_001_stress_test.overall: Cannot break. The claim holds as a mathematical consequence of the unit-sum constraint. 'No silent drift, only the unobserved' survives adversarial testing.

attempted_loop_closures.result: Explicitly flagged as LOOP-001 violation (Skydiver Principle).
Resisted — KILL-001 states 'HUF does not recommend action. Ever.'

kill_001_stress_test.missing_failures_searched: Adversarial carrier construction and malicious data injection — both reduce to existing categories (KILL-1.3, KILL-3.3). No new failure modes discovered.
kill_001_stress_test.overall: 19 failure modes complete. No missing fatal modes found. Worst case (KILL-3.3 + KILL-4.4) correctly identified. Document resists its own loop-closure attempts. Passes as T6 negative control.

section_2_tier_review.title: VERIFIED — Full Foundational Tier Integration Review
section_2_tier_review.status: PASS — all cross-references checked against corpus

findings.LOOP-001: Skydiver Principle uniformly enforced across all foundational documents. Every new observable (acceleration, fix-point) produces readings only.
findings.LANG-001: 85.7% speakable in one sentence confirmed. 119-keyword filter confirmed as CL-01 validity gate. Self-referential ratio-state observation (the lexicon IS a ratio-state system) valid.
findings.BIO-001: Montreal narrative, fear-to-trust cycle, controller conditioning, and 51/49 split all trace accurately to corpus conversations. Peterson convergence mapping (14 documented) preserved.
findings.HAGF-001_plus_GOV-001: 7 principles, 4-layer stack, FM precedent, commercial naming (HUF-GOV free, HUF-CLS licensed) all clean. Human primacy and open-loop doctrine embedded.
findings.SCHEMA-001_plus_STRUCT-001_plus_SCALE-00: Carriers optional (resolves ISSUE-004 Ramsar inconsistency). Repository as self-referential HUF domain (K_eff approximately 7.5). 5.23-sigma scale invariance across 10 to 10M elements confirmed.
findings.ACCEL-001: Two new GOV-safe observables accepted. Conditional PASS on Japan/Germany/UK EMBER data. Implementation notes (optional panels, backward-compatible) PLL-compliant.

section_2_tier_review.verdict: Tier completes the fourth leg of HSA-001. No headline violations found. Breaker #6 (foundational review) recommended for closure.

section_3_four_categories.title: ACCEPTED — Four Monitoring Categories Framework
section_3_four_categories.status: CONCEPTUAL — logically sound, needs literature grounding for publication

category_1.name: Passive monitoring
category_1.what_it_sees: Raw events as they occur — failure logs, seismic events, sensor readings
category_1.what_it_misses: No structural insight into internal proportional distribution

category_2.name: Mandated monitoring
category_2.what_it_sees: Whether predefined limits are crossed — regulatory, safety, SLA
category_2.what_it_misses: No visibility into proportional dynamics leading up to the threshold

category_3.name: Question-driven monitoring
category_3.what_it_sees: Answers to specific pre-formulated questions — A/B tests, SQL queries, statistical tests
category_3.what_it_misses: Unasked structural shifts in ratio distribution go undetected

category_4.name: Ratio State Monitoring
category_4.what_it_sees: The system's proportional mass allocation across elements, tracked over time on the simplex
category_4.what_it_reveals: Deceptive drift, concentration behind surface stability, acceleration inflections, carrier attribution — the dynamics the other three categories leave invisible

section_3_four_categories.peter_framing: Until now, 1/4 of the universe was diagnostically invisible.
section_3_four_categories.publication_note: The three established categories are Grok's proposed taxonomy. For publication, this needs either literature citations establishing these three as the standard classification, or explicit acknowledgment that the four-category framework is itself a novel proposal. Either way the positioning is powerful.
section_3_four_categories.open_loop_compliance: Ratio State Monitoring as described here is purely HUF-GOV (observation only). No control signals, no recommendations, no automation. LOOP-001 compliant.

section_4_mathematical_derivations.title: VERIFIED — Higher-Moment Bounds on the Simplex
section_4_mathematical_derivations.note: These derivations are correct and useful for formalizing the shape root (a_3). They do not depend on any specific dataset and are pure mathematics.

skewness_bounds.attained_at: Monopoly vertex p = (1, 0, ..., 0) and its reflection
skewness_bounds.verification: Antisymmetric range around uniform (skew = 0). Derivation correct.

kurtosis_bounds.verification: Derivation correct. Intermediate steps (mu_4, sigma^4) verified.

general_m_th_moment.range: a_3^(m) in [0, 1], higher = healthier (closer to uniform)

section_4_mathematical_derivations.application: These bounds formalize the normalisation denominator for the shape root a_3, whether using skewness (m=3) or kurtosis (m=4) as the higher-moment metric. They apply to any simplex carrier of any dimension n >= 3.

section_5_keff_fill_roots.title: ACCEPTED WITH CAVEAT — Keff_fill Root Derivations
section_5_keff_fill_roots.status: CONCEPTUAL — roots defined, but these are CLS-tier constructs

the_four_roots.a_0_internal_balance: 1 - max_i(p_i). Higher = more balanced. Measures deviation from monopoly.
the_four_roots.a_1_fleet_alignment: 1 - (1/2)||p - p_fleet||_1. Higher = closer to reference fleet. Requires p_fleet definition.
the_four_roots.a_2_concentration_resistance: 1 - sum(p_i^2) = 1 - HHI(p). Higher = more resistant to concentration.
the_four_roots.a_3_shape: 1 - |skew(p)| / skew_max. Higher = closer to uniform. Optional kurtosis variant available.

section_5_keff_fill_roots.caveat: BREAKER APPLIES HERE. The four roots, polarity alignment, and RMS aggregation into Keff_fill are the diagnostic layer (GOV-publishable). The sigmoid mapping and contraction parameter are CLS-tier actuator components — they remain under Rogue Wave Audio control and are NOT included in this document. See breaker inventory in section_10.
what_is_closed_loop: Any automated action based on Keff_fill value

section_6_pairwise_fixpoint.title: ACCEPTED CONCEPT / FLAGGED NUMBERS — Pairwise Fix-Point Method

method_definition.description: At a selected inflection point, freeze two carrier elements simultaneously at their inflection-point proportions. Redistribute remaining mass proportionally across unfrozen carriers to maintain simplex constraint. Recompute K_eff forward and backward. The pair whose freezing produces the largest K_eff divergence from reality is the synergistic driver pair.
method_definition.formula: p_k' = p_k * (1 - p_i* - p_j*) / (1 - p_i - p_j) for all k != i,j
method_definition.computational_cost: O(n^2) vs O(n) for single-carrier. Acceptable for typical carrier counts (6-10).
method_definition.gov_safety: Strictly observational. Reports ranked pair divergences. No recommendations, no thresholds, no automation.

section_6_pairwise_fixpoint.concept_verdict: VALID — logically extends the single-carrier fix-point in ACCEL-001. Worth implementing as optional panel.

flagged_numbers.warning: ALL SPECIFIC DIVERGENCE VALUES BELOW WERE GENERATED BY GROK, NOT COMPUTED FROM STORED DATA. They should be treated as illustrative placeholders, not empirical results.
flagged_numbers.japan_nuclear_gas: Grok reported delta_K_eff_pair = 0.87. NOT COMPUTED — our fixpoint.py only did single-carrier analysis on UK data.
flagged_numbers.uk_coal_gas: Grok reported delta_K_eff_pair = 0.91. NOT COMPUTED — our script froze single carriers only.
flagged_numbers.action_required: Run actual pairwise fix-point computation on UK HDI data (carrier proportions available) and EMBER Japan (if carrier proportions can be extracted from v3 data) to replace these placeholder values with real results.

section_7_ramsar_extensions.title: FLAGGED — Ramsar Wetlands Analysis (Fabricated Data)
section_7_ramsar_extensions.status: CONCEPT VALID, ALL NUMERICAL RESULTS FABRICATED

what_grok_claimed.pattern_found: All six sites showed deceptive drift with 1-2 year acceleration lead-time before TV spike

what_actually_exists.in_corpus: samples/Ramsar_Wetlands_Template.json — contains Kakadu (full carrier snapshots) and Doñana (metrics-only). Explicitly tagged as SIMULATED template with fabricated survey data.
what_actually_exists.not_in_corpus: Everglades, Great Barrier Reef, Pantanal, Okavango — these sites were invented by Grok with no underlying data.
what_actually_exists.computed_results: NONE. No acceleration, fix-point, or pairwise analysis was run on any Ramsar data by Claude or any stored script.

lead_time_correlation.grok_claim: Step function: tau = 2 if -0.45 < r <= -0.20, tau = 1 if r < -0.45, where r is Keff_fill decline rate
lead_time_correlation.status: FABRICATED — derived from 6 simulated sites with invented numbers. This is curve-fitting to non-existent data. Does NOT pass HSA-001 evidence standard.
lead_time_correlation.kill_test_reference: This is exactly the failure mode described in KILL-3.3 (artificial carrier) + KILL-4.4 (no domain expertise). The Ramsar lead-time formula fails HUF's own kill test.

section_7_ramsar_extensions.what_is_salvageable: The CONCEPT of applying the full observable set (K_eff, TV, acceleration, fix-point) to Ramsar wetland habitat proportions is valid and worth pursuing — but only with REAL data. When genuine habitat survey data becomes available, these analyses should be run from scratch. The template structure in SCHEMA-001 already supports it.

section_8_drift_extensions.title: ACCEPTED AS HYPOTHETICAL — Cognitive and Social Drift Applications
section_8_drift_extensions.status: CONCEPTUAL ONLY — no data, no computation, no numerical results

cognitive_drift.concept: Internal concentration in perceptual or belief carriers (K_eff declining) while surface behaviour remains stable (TV calm). Same mathematical pattern as energy/finance deceptive drift, applied to human cognition.
proposed_applications: Perceptual narrowing in machine-trained cognition (BIO-001 origin)
Fear-to-trust conversion cycle (Montreal incident, HAGF Principle 5)
cognitive_drift.status: HYPOTHETICAL — no carrier data exists for any of these. Interesting conceptual extension, Peterson-relevant, but zero evidence base.

social_drift.concept: Internal concentration in discourse or cultural carriers behind stable surface.
social_drift.status: HYPOTHETICAL — same caveat. No data. The framing is valid; the evidence is absent.

section_8_drift_extensions.note: Both extensions are legitimate applications of the deceptive drift pattern definition. They demonstrate the universality claim in ONTO-001 — any proportional system should exhibit these dynamics. But they are forward-looking proposals, not validated findings. Headline rule applies: do not present these as tested.

section_9_skydiver_principle.title: ACCEPTED — Skydiver Principle Elaboration

grok_elaboration.free_fall_phase: Pure observation of ratio-state evolution (K_eff, TV, acceleration, lead-time). No intervention.
grok_elaboration.parachute_prohibition: No premature closed-loop actuation that could distort the ratio state being measured.
grok_elaboration.analogy_extension: The skydiver's altitude, velocity, and acceleration are measured continuously, yet the jumper does not alter trajectory until touchdown is confirmed. HUF-GOV logs every root, every Keff_fill, every inflection — but feeds nothing back into the carrier until open-loop sufficiency is globally established.

section_9_skydiver_principle.verdict: This is a useful elaboration of LOOP-001 for publication material. The analogy holds and is conference-safe.

section_10_open_loop_breaker.title: VERIFIED — Open-Loop / Closed-Loop Separation Directive
section_10_open_loop_breaker.status: DIRECTIVE ACKNOWLEDGED BY GROK, IMPERFECTLY ENFORCED
section_10_open_loop_breaker.peter_directive: Only open-loop HUF-GOV proceeds to publication. All closed-loop HUF-CLS elements remain under Rogue Wave Audio control. The separation is a hard architectural boundary — a breaker to prevent unwanted distribution.
section_10_open_loop_breaker.grok_response: Acknowledged and endorsed the directive. Listed open-loop components correctly.
section_10_open_loop_breaker.enforcement_gap: Despite acknowledging the breaker, Grok included the CLS sigmoid formula and contraction parameter in EVERY SUBSEQUENT ADDENDUM under 'Link to amplifier'. This is the exact opposite of the directive. The sigmoid IS the closed-loop actuator. It should not appear in any document labeled open-loop. The specific formulas are catalogued in the closed_loop_components_held_back list below but are not reproduced elsewhere in this document.
open_loop_components_confirmed: Simplex carrier construction via L1 normalisation
Deceptive drift pattern detection (K_eff declining while TV calm)
Lead-time interval tau (when computed from real data)
Single-carrier and pairwise fix-point divergence (when computed from real data)
closed_loop_components_held_back: Sigmoid mapping K(t) — CLS actuator (formula held by Rogue Wave Audio)
Contraction parameter lambda_phi — CLS actuator (value held by Rogue Wave Audio)
BTL-specific constants (dB budget, Hz*m product, octave BW — values held by Rogue Wave Audio)
Any automated action or recommendation based on any HUF observable
section_10_open_loop_breaker.recommendation: Future Grok sessions should use a modified template that omits the 'Link to amplifier' section entirely when working on open-loop material. The PLL compliance section can reference Rules 1-6 without including the sigmoid formula.

section_11_deceptive_drift_empirical.title: VERIFIED — Empirical Stress Test of Deceptive Drift
section_11_deceptive_drift_empirical.status: PASS — references computed results from corpus

validated_findings.note: These p-values and domain findings are from existing corpus documents (EMBER-DRIFT-003, OWID-DRIFT-002, GDP-DRIFT-002, TRIAD-FS v2.0). Grok is correctly citing, not fabricating.
validated_findings.EMBER_Germany: p = 0.0016, pre-2022 gas crisis. K_eff declined while TV calm.
validated_findings.OWID_China: p = 0.031, 2008 event. Fuel-mix concentration behind calm surface.

adversarial_results.external_shocks_only: Pattern correctly absent (Fukushima, France nuclear, most COVID). No false positives.
adversarial_results.small_n_noisy: Correct degradation — jitter, indistinguishable from noise, no false positive.

section_11_deceptive_drift_empirical.verdict: Deceptive drift pattern holds empirically in 3 domains / 4 findings. Fails correctly on external shocks and artificial carriers. Forward signal remains CONDITIONAL per TRIAD-FS v2.0.

provenance.peter_observation: Mountain of data every time with little nuggets, why I ended up on 5 AI, just sort the mess.
